title: JourneyEssentials
description: A plugin that connects EssentialsX and EssentialsXSpawn to Journey.
body:
This plugin connects Journey to Essentials (EssentialsX) and connects Journey to EssentialsSpawn. For example, a server administrator could disable players' ability to use `/home` and players can instead use Journey to calculate an alternative route to their home location.

If you use both EssentialsX and Journey, this plugin is highly recommended.
